description: Time series prediction and anomaly detection. Each call costs $0.01 USDC on Base, paid automatically via x402 micropayments. Your private key signs payments locally and is never sent to any server.

tools.name: predict_timeseries
tools.description: Predict the next value in a numeric time series. Uses automatic model selection (linear, log1p-linear, last-delta, mean) via holdout evaluation. Costs $0.01 USDC on Base via x402.

context.description: What the series represents, e.g. 'monthly revenue USD'.

tools.name: detect_anomalies
tools.description: Detect anomalies in a numeric series using z-score analysis. Returns flagged points with their z-scores. Costs $0.01 USDC on Base via x402.

threshold.description: Z-score cutoff. Default 2.0 — lower values flag more points.

context.description: What the series represents, e.g. 'cpu usage %'.

WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY.description: EVM wallet private key (0x...) for signing x402 micropayments on Base. Signs locally — never sent to any server.
